project.title: AUTOFICTION // PROJECT ARCHIVE
project.subtitle: 浓缩文档仓库 / Dense archive repository
project.notice: Use this as a live folder index. Replace placeholder media paths with your own files under /assets.

tabs.label: 物理研究 Photos+Video
tabs.description: Raw documentation from in-person research runs.

tabs.label: 外链框架 Iframes
tabs.description: Embedded supporting websites and research tools.

tabs.label: 演出文档 Live Show
tabs.description: Run-of-show notes, cues, and timing logs.

tabs.label: 场景文档 Set
tabs.description: Build records, material specs, and setup checklists.

tabs.label: 脚本 Script
tabs.description: Scene script, revisions, and annotation fragments.

tabs.label: 创意方向 Creative Direction
tabs.description: Visual language, thematic tone, and narrative strategy references.

tabs.label: 数字研究 Digital Research
tabs.description: Online source analysis, platform studies, and digital references.

documents.title: Run Sheet V5
documents.description: Minute-by-minute cue sheet with operator ownership tags.
documents.excerpt: 19:30 Open house; 19:42 Cue L-03, audio bed enters at -12dB; 19:45 performer entry stage-left.
documents.author: Elizabeth Kezia Widjaja

documents.title: Performer Cue Notes
documents.description: Quick prompt list for transitions, safety checks, and fallback beats.
documents.excerpt: If projection desync exceeds 2s, hold at beat marker C and repeat movement phrase 03.
documents.author: Elizabeth Kezia Widjaja

documents.title: Set Build Checklist
documents.description: Load-in checklist covering rigging, power, and projection alignment.
documents.excerpt: Confirm truss torque markers, cable channels, and emergency clear paths before rehearsal.
documents.author: Elizabeth Kezia Widjaja

documents.title: Material BOM
documents.description: Costed bill of materials grouped by module and revision batch.
documents.excerpt: Panels: 18; steel brackets: 74; matte diffusion film: 52m; reserve hardware: 12%.
documents.author: Elizabeth Kezia Widjaja

documents.title: Script Draft 03/22/2026
documents.description: Current narrative baseline with timing anchors and speech rhythm marks.
documents.excerpt: Scene 04: Performer crosses interior line, repeats phrase in split cadence with projected subtitle stack.
documents.author: Shihan Tan

documents.title: Creative Direction Manifesto v1
documents.description: Core visual and narrative principles guiding layout, pacing, and material choices.
documents.excerpt: Prioritize compressed information fields, layered references, and intentional visual overload.
documents.author: Elizabeth Kezia Widjaja

documents.title: Moodboard Index
documents.description: Cross-linked board references for fonts, textures, signage, and movement motifs.
documents.excerpt: Group references by scene utility: transition, conflict, release, and reflective cooldown.
documents.author: Elizabeth Kezia Widjaja

documents.title: Reasons of Going to Matchmaking Agency
documents.description: Interview notes summarizing motivations behind matchmaking agency use.
documents.excerpt: want to make parents stop bothering them about marriage; most time is spent on work not social life; "can meet more people via agency, its more EFFICIENT"; people wanna skip the struggles (and use their partner wealth to accommodate that); men is expected to ideally have car and mortgage free apart
documents.author: Elizabeth Kezia Widjaja

documents.title: Male Client Highlighted Attributes
documents.description: Attributes that male client highlight on the interview.
documents.author: Elizabeth Kezia Widjaja
